title: NASA TESS Exoplanet Mission
description: A NASA source card about TESS and the search for exoplanets.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA TESS resources explain how the Transiting Exoplanet Survey Satellite searches for planets by measuring tiny changes in starlight.
Use this source for students learning how indirect evidence, graphs, repeated measurements, and models support planet discoveries.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, insignia, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
